items.title: Many Paths to Recovery: The Case for Treatment Pluralism.
items.summary: An editorial argues for treatment pluralism in musculoskeletal pain, stating that decades of research show no consistently superior treatment, with various interventions demonstrating modest and broadly equivalent effects.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论强调了肌肉骨骼疼痛治疗的“多元主义”，即没有单一的“最佳”疗法，各种干预措施（如运动疗法和手法技术）的平均疗效大致相当。这提示你，临床实践中应回归以患者为中心，根据患者偏好、背景和特定症状，灵活运用多种循证干预手段。
items.titleZh: 多种康复途径：支持治疗多元主义的案例
items.summaryZh: 一篇社论主张肌肉骨骼疼痛治疗的多元主义，指出数十年研究未能找到持续优越的单一疗法，各种干预措施均显示出适度且大致相当的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial emphasizes "treatment pluralism" in musculoskeletal pain, noting that no single "best" therapy exists and various interventions (e.g., exercise and manual techniques) have broadly equivalent average effects. This suggests that your clinical practice should return to being patient-centered, flexibly employing multiple evidence-based interventions based on patient preferences, context, and specific symptoms.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Exercise interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis confirmed the effectiveness of exercise-based interventions on pain and function for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults.
items.curatedReason: 针对中老年肩袖相关性肩痛，这项系统综述和荟萃分析证实了运动干预能有效改善疼痛和功能。这进一步强化了运动疗法作为肩袖相关疼痛一线治疗的证据基础，在临床实践中应优先推荐并提供个性化运动方案。
items.titleZh: 运动干预对中老年肩袖相关性肩痛的效果：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析证实，运动干预能有效改善中老年肩袖相关性肩痛的疼痛和功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms that exercise interventions effectively improve pain and function in middle-aged and older adults with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain. This further strengthens the evidence base for exercise therapy as a first-line treatment for rotator cuff-related pain; you should prioritize recommending and providing personalized exercise programs in clinical practice.

items.title: Diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test in individuals with stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) cutoff values for individuals with stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了BBS和Mini-BESTest在卒中患者中的诊断和预后准确性。这对于你选择评估卒中患者平衡功能的工具至关重要，它提供了基于证据的参考标准，让你能更精准地判断患者的跌倒风险和功能恢复潜力。
items.titleZh: Berg平衡量表和Mini-BESTest在卒中患者诊断和预后准确性：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析研究了Berg平衡量表（BBS）和Mini-BESTest在卒中患者中诊断和预后准确性的截断值。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis evaluates the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of the Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) in stroke patients. This is crucial for your choice of tools to assess balance function in stroke patients, providing evidence-based reference standards that enable more precise assessment of fall risk and functional recovery potential.

items.title: THE COMPARATIVE EFFECTIVENESS OF INPATIENT VERSUS SKILLED NURSING FACILITY REHABILITATION USING LINKED ACUTE STROKE REGISTRY DATA.
items.summary: A retrospective comparative effectiveness cohort study examined the impact of inpatient rehabilitation facilities versus skilled nursing facilities on "home time" (a proxy for functional recovery) among acute stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项利用急性卒中登记数据进行的比较有效性研究表明，住院康复机构（IRFs）与专业护理机构（SNFs）在卒中患者功能恢复（以“居家时间”衡量）方面可能存在差异。你应理解不同康复设置的优劣，并结合患者具体情况和支付能力，为患者推荐最合适的康复路径，最大化其居家恢复潜力。
items.titleZh: 利用急性卒中登记数据比较住院康复与专业护理机构康复的有效性
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性比较有效性队列研究，利用急性卒中登记数据，评估了住院康复机构与专业护理机构康复对急性卒中患者“居家时间”（功能恢复的替代指标）的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This comparative effectiveness study, using acute stroke registry data, suggests potential differences in functional recovery (measured by "home time") between Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) and Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs) for stroke patients. You should understand the pros and cons of different rehabilitation settings and recommend the most suitable path for patients, considering their specific condition and payment capabilities, to maximize their home recovery potential.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: THE COMPARATIVE EFFECTIVENESS OF INPATIENT VERSUS SKILLED NURSING FACILITY REHABILITATION USING LINKED ACUTE STROKE REGISTRY DATA.

items.title: Dry needling and muscle mechanical properties in myofascial trigger points: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the effects of dry needling on myofascial mechanical properties in adults with active or latent myofascial trigger points.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析探讨了干针疗法对肌筋膜触发点机械特性的影响。它为你提供了干针作为治疗手段的证据基础，特别是针对改变肌肉机械特性方面。在临床实践中，你可以更有信心地将干针应用于目标触发点，但仍需结合整体治疗方案。
items.titleZh: 干针疗法与肌筋膜触发点肌肉机械特性：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了干针疗法对活动性或潜在肌筋膜触发点成年患者肌筋膜机械特性的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis explores the effects of dry needling on the mechanical properties of myofascial trigger points. It provides you with an evidence base for dry needling as a treatment modality, particularly in altering muscle mechanical properties. In clinical practice, you can apply dry needling to target trigger points with more confidence, but it should still be integrated into a holistic treatment plan.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Early versus conventional postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty: a systematic review of functional outcomes and complications.
items.summary: A systematic review found no significant differences in functional outcomes or complications between early (≤14 days) and delayed (≥28 days) postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty.
items.curatedReason: 关于反式全肩关节置换术（rTSA）术后康复，这项系统综述发现早期康复（≤14天）与传统康复（≥28天）在功能结果和并发症上没有显著差异。这提示你可以根据患者个体情况和康复资源灵活安排康复启动时机，不必强制性延迟。
items.titleZh: 反式全肩关节置换术后早期与传统康复：功能结局和并发症的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述发现，反式全肩关节置换术后早期（≤14天）与传统（≥28天）康复在功能结局和并发症方面没有显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review suggests that early rehabilitation (≤14 days) versus conventional rehabilitation (≥28 days) after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) shows no significant differences in functional outcomes or complications. This allows you flexibility in timing rehabilitation initiation based on individual patient needs and resource availability, rather than strictly adhering to delayed protocols.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches on pain and function in patients with chronic pain in primary care: a retrospective observational study.
items.summary: A retrospective observational study found no significant differences in pain and function outcomes among supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches for chronic pain patients in primary care.
items.curatedReason: 关于慢性疼痛的康复，这项回顾性研究发现个体、团体和混合理疗方案在主要疼痛和功能结局上没有显著差异。这意味着在资源有限或患者偏好团体环境时，团体理疗是一个同样有效的选项，你可以根据临床情境和患者需求灵活选择。
items.titleZh: 初级保健中个体、团体及混合物理治疗对慢性疼痛患者疼痛和功能的比较效果：回顾性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性观察研究发现，初级保健中个体、团体和混合物理治疗方案在慢性疼痛患者的疼痛和功能结局上无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: For chronic pain rehabilitation, this retrospective study found no significant differences in primary pain and functional outcomes across individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches. This means group physiotherapy is an equally effective option when resources are limited or patients prefer a group setting; you can flexibly choose based on clinical context and patient needs.

items.title: Physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to the implementation of high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain: a scoping review and narrative synthesis of 37 studies.
items.summary: A scoping review of 37 studies identified physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to implementing high-value physiotherapy, such as exercise, for chronic pain.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述明确指出了物理治疗师在慢性疼痛高价值理疗实施中的障碍和促成因素。你需要审视自身的临床实践，评估是否存在过度依赖低价值治疗（如手法）而忽视高价值治疗（如运动）的情况，并主动寻求克服障碍、采纳循证实践的方法。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师在慢性疼痛高价值理疗实施中的障碍和促成因素：37项研究的范围综述与叙述性综合
items.summaryZh: 一项对37项研究的范围综述确定了物理治疗师在实施慢性疼痛高价值理疗（如运动）方面的障碍和促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review clearly identifies physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to implementing high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain. You need to examine your own clinical practice, assess whether there's an over-reliance on low-value treatments (e.g., manual therapy) at the expense of high-value treatments (e.g., exercise), and actively seek ways to overcome barriers and adopt evidence-based practices.

items.title: Effect of Femoral Nerve Neurodynamic Techniques on Pain in Patellofemoral Pain Syndrome: A Randomised Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=71) found that adding femoral nerve neurodynamic techniques to routine physiotherapy significantly reduced pain and improved function in patients with patellofemoral pain syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验发现股神经神经动力学技术能额外改善髌股疼痛综合征患者的疼痛和功能。这表明在常规治疗方案中加入神经动力学干预，特别是针对髌股疼痛，可能带来增益。你可以考虑将其整合到你的治疗工具箱中。
items.titleZh: 股神经神经动力学技术对髌股疼痛综合征疼痛的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对71名患者的随机对照试验发现，在常规物理治疗中加入股神经神经动力学技术，能显著减轻髌股疼痛综合征患者的疼痛并改善功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial found that femoral nerve neurodynamic techniques provided additional improvements in pain and function for patients with patellofemoral pain syndrome. This suggests that incorporating neurodynamic interventions into routine treatment, especially for patellofemoral pain, may offer added benefits. You can consider integrating this into your treatment toolkit.

items.title: Barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury in China: A qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among community-dwelling adults with spinal cord injury in China, using the COM-B model.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对中国脊髓损伤（SCI）患者休闲时间体育活动障碍和促成因素的定性研究，揭示了文化和环境背景对康复依从性的影响。作为临床医生，你需要理解并考虑这些社会心理因素，才能更好地制定个性化的康复计划，提高患者依从性和活动水平。
items.titleZh: 中国脊髓损伤患者休闲时间体育活动的障碍与促成因素：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究采用COM-B模型，探讨了中国社区脊髓损伤成年人休闲时间体育活动的障碍与促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study on barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI) in China reveals the impact of cultural and environmental contexts on rehabilitation adherence. As a clinician, you need to understand and consider these psychosocial factors to better formulate personalized rehabilitation plans and improve patient adherence and activity levels.

items.title: Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) to Recover Arm Activity After Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A single-blind, randomized, sham-controlled trial evaluated the feasibility and effects of a home-based wearable myoelectric interface (MINT) on arm activity in moderately-to-severely impaired chronic stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验评估了可穿戴肌电界面（MINT）在慢性卒中患者手臂功能恢复中的可行性及效果。对于中度至重度上肢功能障碍的患者，MINT作为一种居家治疗方案，有望改善异常肌肉协同激活。你可以关注这类技术进展，未来将其纳入居家康复指导。
items.titleZh: 可穿戴肌电界面（MINT）在卒中后手臂活动恢复中的应用：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲、随机、假对照试验评估了居家可穿戴肌电界面（MINT）在中度至重度慢性卒中患者手臂活动恢复中的可行性和效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial evaluated the feasibility and effects of a wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) in restoring arm activity after stroke. For patients with moderate-to-severe upper limb impairment, MINT, as a home-based therapy, shows promise in reducing abnormal muscle co-activation. You can follow such technological advancements to potentially integrate them into home rehabilitation guidance in the future.

items.title: Effect of home-based rehabilitation in frail older adults after cardiac surgery: a prospective feasibility study.
items.summary: A prospective feasibility study evaluated the Vivifrail structured, multicomponent exercise program as a home-based rehabilitation intervention for frail older adults after cardiac surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项可行性研究表明，Vivifrail居家多组分运动方案在心脏手术后虚弱老年人中是可行的。这为你提供了一个在临床中推广居家康复的循证工具，特别对于高风险的虚弱老年患者，可以考虑将此结构化方案纳入术后康复计划。
items.titleZh: 心脏手术后虚弱老年人居家康复的效果：一项前瞻性可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性可行性研究评估了Vivifrail结构化多组分运动方案作为心脏手术后虚弱老年人居家康复干预的可行性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study indicates that the Vivifrail home-based multicomponent exercise program is feasible for frail older adults after cardiac surgery. This provides you with an evidence-based tool for promoting home rehabilitation in clinical practice, especially for high-risk frail elderly patients; consider incorporating this structured program into their postoperative rehabilitation plan.

items.title: Effect of a multimodal exercise training program on sleep in older adults: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=60) investigated the effect of a multimodal exercise training program on sleep quality in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，多模式运动训练计划能有效改善老年人的睡眠质量。鉴于睡眠问题在老年人群中普遍存在并影响康复效果，你可以在老年康复中积极推荐并指导多模式运动，将其作为改善整体健康和睡眠的有效干预手段。
items.titleZh: 多模式运动训练计划对老年人睡眠的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=60）研究了多模式运动训练计划对老年人睡眠质量的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial demonstrates that a multimodal exercise training program can effectively improve sleep quality in older adults. Given the prevalence of sleep issues in the elderly population and their impact on rehabilitation outcomes, you can actively recommend and guide multimodal exercise in geriatric rehabilitation as an effective intervention to improve overall health and sleep.

items.title: The impact of a brief online education intervention on the knowledge, attitudes and beliefs of qualified physiotherapists about chronic low back pain: Pre- and post-intervention survey.
items.summary: A pre- and post-intervention survey found that a brief online education intervention improved qualified physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs about chronic low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 在线教育干预能改善PT对慢性腰痛的知识、态度和信念。这表明通过专业教育提升生物心理社会模型在慢性腰痛管理中的应用是可行的，但需要更多研究来评估其对患者实际临床结果的影响。
items.titleZh: 简短在线教育干预对理疗师慢性腰痛知识、态度和信念的影响：干预前后调查
items.summaryZh: 一项干预前后调查显示，简短在线教育干预改善了合格理疗师对慢性腰痛的知识、态度和信念。
items.curatedReasonEn: Online education interventions can improve PTs' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs regarding chronic low back pain. This suggests that professional education can effectively enhance the application of the biopsychosocial model in chronic LBP management, though further research is needed to assess its impact on actual patient clinical outcomes.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Is Knee Osteoarthritis an Inevitable Consequence for Athletes after Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury?
items.summary: A review discusses anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury not solely as an acute event but as a long-term risk factor for post-traumatic knee osteoarthritis in athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述提醒你ACL损伤不仅仅是一个急性事件，更是导致创伤后膝关节骨关节炎的长期风险。在康复计划中，除了恢复运动表现，更应注重长期的膝关节健康管理和预防骨关节炎的策略。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带损伤后膝骨关节炎是运动员不可避免的后果吗？
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述探讨了前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤对于运动员而言，不仅仅是急性创伤，更是导致创伤后膝骨关节炎的长期风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review reminds you that ACL injury is not just an acute event but a long-term risk factor for post-traumatic knee osteoarthritis. In rehabilitation plans, beyond restoring athletic performance, you should emphasize long-term knee joint health management and strategies to prevent osteoarthritis.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Developing consensus on competency-based educational standards in orthopaedic manual physical therapy fellowship training: part 2: knowledge for specialty practice and professionalism.
items.summary: This is part 2 of developing consensus on competency-based educational standards for orthopaedic manual physical therapy fellowship training, focusing on knowledge for specialty practice and professionalism.
items.curatedReason: 这份关于OMPT专科培训能力标准的共识制定，对于提升手法物理治疗师的专业水平和执业一致性至关重要。作为OMPT从业者或学员，你应该关注并理解这些标准，以指导你的知识学习和专业发展。
items.titleZh: 骨科手法物理治疗专科培训能力教育标准共识制定：第2部分：专科实践知识与专业精神
items.summaryZh: 这是骨科手法物理治疗专科培训能力教育标准共识制定的第二部分，重点关注专科实践知识和专业精神。
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Effectiveness of passive vs. assistive robotic gait training on functional recovery and neuroplasticity post-stroke: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A single-blind randomized controlled trial (N=48) compared the impacts of passive versus assistive robotic gait training on lower limb motor function recovery and neural mechanisms in subacute stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验比较了被动与辅助机器人步态训练对亚急性卒中患者功能恢复和神经可塑性的影响。虽然机器人辅助训练效果显著，但你需要关注具体模式（被动 vs 辅助）的差异，并结合患者具体情况选择最合适的机器人康复方案。
items.titleZh: 卒中后被动与辅助机器人步态训练对功能恢复和神经可塑性的效果：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲随机对照试验（N=48）比较了被动与辅助机器人步态训练对亚急性卒中患者下肢运动功能恢复和神经机制的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial compared the effects of passive versus assistive robotic gait training on functional recovery and neuroplasticity in subacute stroke patients. While robotic-assisted training shows significant effects, you need to pay attention to the differences between specific modes (passive vs. assistive) and choose the most suitable robotic rehabilitation program based on the patient's specific condition.

items.title: Core Stability Training for Post-Stroke Recovery: A Multifaceted Approach to Enhance Postural Control and Motor Function.
items.summary: This review explores the multifaceted mechanisms by which Core Stability Training (CST) enhances postural control and motor function in stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述阐述了核心稳定性训练在卒中后姿势控制和运动功能恢复中的多方面作用。虽然是综述而非原创研究，但它提供了一个框架，强化了你将核心稳定性训练整合到卒中康复方案中的理论基础。
items.titleZh: 卒中后核心稳定性训练：增强姿势控制和运动功能的多方面方法
items.summaryZh: 本综述探讨了核心稳定性训练（CST）通过多方面机制，增强卒中幸存者姿势控制和运动功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review elaborates on the multifaceted role of core stability training in post-stroke postural control and motor function recovery. While a review rather than original research, it provides a framework that strengthens your theoretical basis for integrating core stability training into stroke rehabilitation programs.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Visuospatial Working Memory Predicts Strategic Motor Learning With Visual Feedback During Gait After Stroke.
items.summary: A study examined whether visuospatial working memory (VSWM) is related to strategic learning guided by visual feedback (VF) during gait rehabilitation after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现视空间工作记忆能预测卒中后步态视觉反馈引导的策略性运动学习。这意味着在设计卒中步态康复时，你需要评估患者的认知能力，特别是视空间工作记忆，从而优化视觉反馈的呈现方式，提高学习效果。
items.titleZh: 视空间工作记忆预测卒中后步态视觉反馈引导的策略性运动学习
items.summaryZh: 一项研究探讨了视空间工作记忆（VSWM）是否与卒中后步态康复中视觉反馈（VF）引导的策略性学习相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that visuospatial working memory predicts strategic motor learning with visual feedback during gait after stroke. This means that when designing stroke gait rehabilitation, you need to assess patients' cognitive abilities, especially visuospatial working memory, to optimize the presentation of visual feedback and enhance learning outcomes.

items.title: Association between Patellofemoral Conditions and the Incidence of ACL Injury: Could Patellofemoral Conditions be a Risk Factor for ACL Injury? A 10-year Population-Based Study.
items.summary: A 10-year population-based study investigated whether patellofemoral conditions are associated with an increased incidence of ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项基于人群的研究提示，髌股关节疾病可能是ACL损伤的风险因素。你在评估膝关节不适或预防ACL损伤时，除了关注常见的运动模式和肌力失衡，还应考虑是否存在髌股关节问题，并将其纳入风险评估和干预策略。
items.titleZh: 髌股关节疾病与ACL损伤发生率的关联：髌股关节疾病是否是ACL损伤的风险因素？一项10年基于人群的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项10年基于人群的研究探讨了髌股关节疾病是否与前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤发生率增加有关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This population-based study suggests that patellofemoral conditions might be a risk factor for ACL injury. When evaluating knee discomfort or preventing ACL injury, you should consider patellofemoral issues in addition to common movement patterns and muscle imbalances, integrating them into your risk assessment and intervention strategies.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Ischemic preconditioning alters gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis.
items.summary: A study evaluated changes in gait mechanics after a single session of ischemic preconditioning in 30 older adults with knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究显示缺血预处理可以改变老年膝骨关节炎患者的步态力学。尽管是单次干预的小样本研究，但它提示了一种非运动干预对步态改善的潜力。在临床实践中，你可以关注这类辅助治疗方法，但需等待更多高证据级别的研究来验证其长期效果和适用性。
items.titleZh: 缺血预处理改变老年膝骨关节炎患者的步态力学
items.summaryZh: 一项研究评估了30名老年膝骨关节炎患者在单次缺血预处理后步态力学的变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study shows that ischemic preconditioning can alter gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis. Although a small-sample study with a single intervention, it suggests the potential of a non-exercise intervention to improve gait. In clinical practice, you can pay attention to such adjunctive therapies, but further high-evidence-level studies are needed to confirm their long-term efficacy and applicability.

items.title: Influence of environmental barriers and facilitators on functioning: Analytical observational study in community-dwelling older adults.
items.summary: An analytical observational study analyzed the influence of environmental barriers and facilitators on the functioning of community-dwelling older adults using standardized instruments.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究量化了环境障碍和促成因素对社区老年人功能的影响。你需要认识到物理和社会环境对老年患者独立性和社会参与的重要性，在评估和制定康复计划时，除了患者自身因素，还应考虑其居住环境的调整和优化。
items.titleZh: 环境障碍和促成因素对功能的影响：社区老年人分析性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 一项分析性观察研究使用标准化工具，分析了环境障碍和促成因素对社区老年人功能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study quantifies the influence of environmental barriers and facilitators on the functioning of community-dwelling older adults. You need to recognize the importance of the physical and social environment for older patients' independence and social participation. When assessing and formulating rehabilitation plans, consider adjusting and optimizing their living environment in addition to patient-specific factors.

items.title: From robustness to frailty: how post-COVID-19 frailty shapes dyspnea, fatigue, and physical and functional status in post-COVID-19 syndrome.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (N=45) examined the relationship between post-COVID-19 frailty and dyspnea, fatigue, and physical/functional status in subjects with post-COVID-19 syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究探讨了COVID-19后衰弱与呼吸困难、疲劳及身心状态的关系。这提示你，在评估和治疗后COVID-19综合征患者时，应识别并关注其衰弱水平，因为衰弱可能是这些症状的重要影响因素，并指导你制定更全面的康复策略。
items.titleZh: 从强健到衰弱：COVID-19后衰弱如何影响后COVID-19综合征患者的呼吸困难、疲劳以及身心状态
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究（N=45）探讨了COVID-19后衰弱与后COVID-19综合征患者呼吸困难、疲劳以及身心状态之间的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study explores the relationship between post-COVID-19 frailty and dyspnea, fatigue, and physical/functional status. This suggests that when assessing and treating patients with post-COVID-19 syndrome, you should identify and focus on their frailty level, as frailty can be a significant influencing factor for these symptoms, guiding you to develop more comprehensive rehabilitation strategies.

items.title: Preventative strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries among male football players: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped the range of preventative strategies used to reduce non-contact lower limb injuries among male footballers.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略。在指导运动员时，你可以参照综述中提到的预防方法，构建更全面的损伤预防方案，并根据运动员具体情况进行个性化调整。
items.titleZh: 男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述绘制了旨在减少男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review synthesizes preventive strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries among male football players. When guiding athletes, you can refer to the preventive methods mentioned in the review to construct a more comprehensive injury prevention program and customize it according to individual athlete circumstances.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Targeting neuromuscular deficits following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction with spinal manipulation: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A single-blind, randomized controlled trial (N=20) investigated the effects of spinal manipulation on neuromuscular activation patterns during single-leg vertical drop landing in individuals with anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验发现脊柱手法可以改善ACL重建后单腿垂直跳落的神经肌肉激活模式。虽然样本量较小，但它提示脊柱手法可能作为ACL康复的辅助手段，帮助恢复神经肌肉控制。在临床实践中，可以将其作为一种补充干预考虑，但需更多大型研究验证其长期疗效。
items.titleZh: 脊柱手法治疗对前交叉韧带重建后神经肌肉缺陷的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲随机对照试验（N=20）研究了脊柱手法治疗对前交叉韧带重建患者单腿垂直跳落时神经肌肉激活模式的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial found that spinal manipulation can improve neuromuscular activation patterns during single-leg vertical drop landing after ACL reconstruction. Although the sample size is small, it suggests that spinal manipulation might serve as an adjunct in ACL rehabilitation to help restore neuromuscular control. In clinical practice, you can consider it as a complementary intervention, but more large-scale studies are needed to validate its long-term efficacy.
items.journal: Journal of electromyography and kinesiology : official journal of the International Society of Electrophysiological Kinesiology

items.title: Randomised three-armed trial investigation of the Copenhagen Achilles tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) for individualised treatment of acute Achilles tendon rupture
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial is investigating whether an individualized treatment algorithm (CARTA) for acute Achilles tendon rupture is superior to default operative or non-operative strategies.
items.curatedReason: CARTA 算法如果优于标准术式/非手术治疗，标志着跟腱断裂从一刀切向个体化决策转变——但现在还在验证阶段，结果出来前别改临床路径。
items.titleZh: 随机三臂试验调查Copenhagen跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）在急性跟腱断裂个体化治疗中的应用
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验正在评估，针对急性跟腱断裂的个体化治疗算法（CARTA）是否优于默认的手术或非手术策略，旨在优化该损伤的治疗效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compares an individualized treatment algorithm (CARTA) for Achilles tendon rupture against standard operative/non-operative care. If CARTA proves superior, it signifies a shift towards personalized rehabilitation strategies, optimizing outcomes for this common injury.

items.title: Long-term resistance training with all-cause and cause-specific mortality: assessing dose-response and joint associations with aerobic physical activity
items.summary: A study assessing resistance training's association with all-cause and cause-specific mortality found dose-response relationships and joint effects with aerobic activity, supporting its role in longevity.
items.curatedReason: 阻力训练与全因死亡率呈剂量反应关系，与有氧运动有协同效应，这是足够强的证据来强化患者进行阻力训练——别再把它当成次要选项。
items.titleZh: 长期抗阻训练与全因及特定原因死亡率：评估剂量反应关系及与有氧活动的联合效应
items.summaryZh: 这项研究评估了长期抗阻训练与全因及特定原因死亡率的关系，发现了剂量反应关系以及与有氧活动的联合效应，有力支持将抗阻训练纳入健康指南以促进长寿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study examines long-term mortality risk associated with resistance training, including dose-response and joint effects with aerobic activity. It strongly supports integrating resistance training into public health recommendations for longevity and warrants emphasizing its role alongside aerobic exercise.

items.title: Smartphone-Based Semi-Immersive Virtual Reality Enhances Upper Extremity Function in Subacute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial demonstrated that augmenting conventional physical therapy with smartphone-based semi-immersive virtual reality significantly enhanced upper extremity function in patients with subacute stroke.
items.curatedReason: 手机VR叠加常规治疗能显著改善急性期卒中上肢功能——成本低、患者易获得，你应该把它纳入卒中康复流程，不必等更多证据。
items.titleZh: 基于智能手机的半沉浸式虚拟现实增强亚急性期中风患者上肢功能：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验表明，在常规物理治疗基础上结合基于智能手机的半沉浸式虚拟现实（VR）可显著改善亚急性期中风患者的上肢功能，提示该技术在神经康复中的应用潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT shows that adding smartphone-based VR to conventional therapy improves upper extremity function in subacute stroke. Given the low-cost, accessible nature of this tech, you should consider integrating it into your stroke rehab protocols to potentially accelerate recovery.

items.title: Are There Sex Disparities in Return to Sport After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction? A Systematic Review and Exploratory Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis investigated sex disparities in return-to-sport outcomes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR), finding potentially smaller differences than expected.
items.curatedReason: 女性ACL术后的返回运动时间差异没想象那么大，别再拿性别差异当借口降低康复标准；真正的变量藏在你看不到的训练强度和心理因素里。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后重返运动是否存在性别差异？系统综述与探索性荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述与探索性荟萃分析探讨了前交叉韧带重建术后（ACLR）重返运动（RTS）结果中的性别差异，发现其差异可能比预期要小，为评估和指导患者的重返运动提供更细致的视角。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis addresses sex disparities in return-to-sport (RTS) after ACLR. It suggests that while female athletes may have higher injury rates, differences in RTS outcomes might be less pronounced than previously thought, or influenced by factors not fully captured. This nuance is critical for setting realistic expectations and tailoring rehab.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Sit-to-stand test emerges as a powerful prognostic factor of future health outcomes: different versions, measurement properties and future perspectives
items.summary: A review concludes that the Sit-to-Stand test is a strong prognostic indicator of future health outcomes across different age groups, highlighting its utility in assessing muscular strength.
items.curatedReason: 坐站测试跨年龄组都能有效预测健康风险，其简便性和测量学特性使它成为功能强度评估和预测不良结局的一线工具。
items.titleZh: 坐站测试成为未来健康结局的有力预测因子：不同版本、测量特性与未来展望
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述指出，坐站测试（Sit-to-Stand test）是评估未来健康结局（包括全因死亡率）的有力预测因子，其简便性使其成为临床评估功能性力量和预测健康风险的宝贵工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review highlights the Sit-to-Stand test as a powerful prognostic factor for health outcomes across age groups. Its simplicity and established measurement properties make it a valuable clinical tool for assessing functional strength and predicting future health risks.
